name: pi
description: Portable skills for operating the pi deploy CLI and authoring rpi.toml project configs.

interface.shortDescription: Operate pi deploy workflows and project configs.
interface.longDescription: Portable skills for working with the pi Raspberry Pi deployment tool: CLI operations, SSH/server profiles, env bundles, deployment checks, and rpi.toml authoring.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use pi skills to prepare a deploy.
